mapper.select:
select a.id,a.store_id,a.living_theme,a.living_time,date_format(start_time,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as start_time ,a.living_time,a.end_time,a.living_status,a.living_img,date_format(a.add_time,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as add_time ,a.user_id,a.living_num,a.living_review_num,a.push_url,a.play_url,a.like_num,a.sort ,b.user_name from lkt_living_room a left join lkt_user b on b.user_id = a.user_id
order by a.sort desc,a.add_time desc limit #{pageStart},#{pageEnd}
select count(1) from lkt_living_room a left join lkt_user b on b.user_id = a.user_id

SELECT a.detailId, a.p_id, a.sid, a.real_sno, a.id, a.consumer_money, a.num, a.sNo, a.NAME, a.sheng, a.shi, a.xian, a.source, a.address, a.store_id, a.add_time, a.mobile, a.old_total, a.old_freight, a.z_price, a.z_freight, a.status, a.goodsNum, a.oid, a.reduce_price, a.coupon_price, a.preferential_amount, a.allow, a.drawid, a.otype, a.ptstatus, a.spz_price, a.user_name, a.user_id, a.mch_id, a.p_sNo, a.shop_id, a.shopName, a.arrive_time, a.settlement_status, a.operation_type, a.product_title, a.attribute, a.img, a.needNum, a.fybl, a.self_lifting, a.is_lssued, a.express_id, a.courier_num, a.freight, a.goodsAmt, a.after_discount, a.pay, a.supplierName, a.supplier_settlement, a.gongyingshang, a.supplier_superior, a.goodsPrice, a.r_status, a.commission, a.living_room_id, a.recycle, a.anchor_id, FROM ( SELECT d.id detailId, d.p_id, d.sid, o.real_sno, o.id, o.consumer_money, o.num, o.sNo, o.NAME, o.sheng, o.shi, o.xian, o.source, o.address, o.store_id, date_format( o.add_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' ) AS add_time, o.mobile, o.old_total, o.old_freight, o.z_price, o.z_freight, o.status, count( d.id ) over(partition by o.id) goodsNum, o.id AS oid, o.reduce_price, o.coupon_price, o.preferential_amount, o.allow, o.drawid, o.otype, o.ptstatus, o.spz_price, lu.user_name, o.user_id, o.mch_id, o.p_sNo, m.id AS shop_id, m.NAME shopName, o.arrive_time, o.settlement_status, o.operation_type, d.p_name product_title, attr.attribute, attr.img, d.num needNum, attr.commission AS fybl, o.self_lifting, o.is_lssued, d.express_id, d.courier_num, d.freight, attr.price goodsAmt, d.after_discount, pay.NAME pay, s.supplier_name supplierName, sum( d.supplier_settlement ) over(partition by o.id) supplier_settlement, p.gongyingshang, p.supplier_superior, d.p_price goodsPrice, d.r_status, d.commission, d.living_room_id, o.recycle, d.anchor_id, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by o.id) AS top FROM lkt_order AS o LEFT JOIN lkt_user AS lu ON o.user_id = lu.user_id RIGHT JOIN lkt_order_details AS d ON o.sNo = d.r_sNo RIGHT JOIN lkt_configure attr ON attr.id = d.sid RIGHT JOIN lkt_product_list AS p ON p.id = attr.pid RIGHT JOIN lkt_mch AS m ON p.mch_id = m.id LEFT JOIN lkt_payment pay ON pay.class_name = o.pay LEFT JOIN lkt_supplier AS s ON p.gongyingshang = s.id
) AS a WHERE a.top <2

select count(1) from lkt_order as o left join lkt_user as lu on o.user_id = lu.user_id right join lkt_order_details as d on o.sNo = d.r_sNo RIGHT JOIN lkt_configure attr on attr.id=d.sid right join lkt_product_list as p on p.id = attr.pid right join lkt_mch as m on p.mch_id = m.id left join lkt_payment pay on pay.class_name = o.pay left join lkt_supplier as s on p.gongyingshang = s.id

SELECT a.id, a.store_id, a.living_theme, a.living_description, a.start_time, a.living_time, a.end_time, a.living_status, a.living_img, a.add_time, a.user_id, a.living_num, a.living_review_num, a.push_url, a.play_url, a.like_num, a.recycle, a.sort, a.living_fans_num, a.fans_num, a.user_name, a.mobile, a.livingNum, a.zhanghao FROM ( SELECT r.*, u.user_name, u.mobile AS mobile, count( 1 ) over(partition by u.id ) AS livingNum, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by u.id) AS top, u.zhanghao, u.id AS uid, u.user_id as u_user_id, u.user_name as uname FROM lkt_living_room r LEFT JOIN lkt_user u ON u.user_id = r.user_id where r.store_id =#{store_id} and r.recycle=0 and (u.id=#{keyWord} or u.user_id= #{keyWord} or u.user_name like concat ('%',#{keyWord},'%') or u.mobile=#{keyWord} or u.zhanghao=#{keyWord})
and r.add_time >= #{startDate} and r.add_time <= #{endDate} order by r.add_time desc ) AS a WHERE a.top < 2

select b.user_id,b.user_name,b.headimgurl as user_img from lkt_living_follow_list a left join lkt_user b on a.user_id = b.user_id where a.anchor_id=#{anchor_id} and a.store_id = #{store_id} and a.recycle=0 and b.user_name like concat ('%',#{user_name},'%')
limit #{pageNo},#{pageSize}
select count(1) from lkt_living_follow_list a left join lkt_user b on a.user_id = b.user_id where a.anchor_id=#{anchor_id} and a.store_id = #{store_id} and a.recycle=0

select a.anchor_id as user_id,b.user_name,b.headimgurl as user_url from lkt_living_follow_list a left join lkt_user b on a.anchor_id = b.user_id where a.user_id=#{user_id} and a.store_id = #{store_id} and a.recycle=0 and b.user_name like concat ('%',#{user_name},'%')
limit #{pageNo},#{pageSize}

select count(1) from lkt_living_follow_list a left join lkt_user b on a.anchor_id = b.user_id where a.user_id=#{user_id} and a.store_id = #{store_id} and a.recycle=0 and b.user_name like concat ('%',#{user_name},'%')
select count(1) from lkt_living_room a left join lkt_user u on a.user_id = u.user_id

select r.id as roomId, u.user_name, u.headimgurl, r.user_id from lkt_living_room r left join lkt_user u on u.user_id = r.user_id where r.store_id = #{store_id} and r.living_status=1 and r.recycle = 0 group by r.user_id, roomId, u.user_name, u.headimgurl order by sort desc limit #{pageSize};
